chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5954 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc No.25095/2021 (Urgent/App). 2. For order on Misc No.25096/2021 (Exemption/App). 3. For order on Misc No.25097/2021 (Stay/App). 4. For hearing of Main Case. 05.10.2021 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Petitioner’s counsel has made an attempt to satisfy this Court that Audi (A6) car is lawfully imported vehicle, on the strength of sale agreement and she submitted that the original documents are yet to be received. These can hardly be consideration for this Court as the only documents that are inevitable for the satisfaction are the import documents/ goods declaration. Those documents are neither with the petitioner nor any copy of it is appended alongwith memo of petition, therefore, there is nothing for us to intervene in so far as the detention memo is concerned. The petitioner may satisfy the concerned officer of Customs Department who issued detention memo by showing relevant documents including the import documents and goods declaration. The petition being misconceived is dismissed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
